content.explanation:
🌐 What is HTML?

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the foundation of every website on the internet.

It is used to structure content like headings, paragraphs, images, and links.

Think of HTML as the skeleton of a website.

🏗️ Simple Analogy

  • 🏠 HTML = structure
  • 🎨 CSS = design
  • ⚙️ JavaScript = behavior

Without HTML, websites would have no structure.
content.syntax_breakdown:
🧱 How HTML Works

HTML uses tags written inside angle brackets.

<tag>Content</tag>

Most elements contain an opening and closing tag.

Example:

<h1>Hello World</h1>
<p>This is a paragraph</p>

The browser reads this code and displays a webpage.

editor_sandbox.starter_code:
My First Website

Hello, I am learning HTML step by step.

mini_challenge.instruction:
🎯 Challenge:

1. Change the text inside the h1 heading
2. Add another paragraph saying: I am building my first website
3. Run and verify your code
mini_challenge.hint:
👉 Example:

I am building my first website

Remember to close every tag properly.

quiz_engine.question: What is the main purpose of HTML?
options: To design how a website looks
To structure content on a webpage

takeaways: Most tags have opening and closing parts
HTML is the foundation of websites
